rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope only when bindings depend on implementation-level structure or subcomponent outputs.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component type and implementation boundaries when inserting AGREE annexes.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible features or explicitly declared constants, never internal subcomponent paths in type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq declarations to define boolean range checks for guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
